templates.name: How do I receive my referral code?
templates.content: Thanks for reaching out. When you refer a friend through our referral program, you should receive your 30% off coupon once your friend makes their first purchase using the link you shared.

templates.name: My friend ordered through my referral, why haven't I received my code?
templates.content: If your friend has already made a purchase and you haven't received your coupon, it might take a little time to process. If it's been a while, please let me know so I can help you follow up on it.

templates.name: Student discount
templates.content: Glad you asked. You can learn more and apply for our offer here: https://www.cariuma.com/pages/our-discount-program?currency=USD

templates.name: Do you have any vegan shoes
templates.content: Yes, you can find our vegan options here: https://cariuma.com/collections/vegan-womens

templates.name: Can I use two discounts?
templates.content: You actually won't be able to use multiple promotions at checkout, but feel free to use the one that has better value for you.

templates.name: Product too expensive
templates.content: Thanks for your feedback, I'll share future promos that may interest you since we'd love to change your mind! If you have any questions just reach out and I'd love to help!

templates.name: Post Purchase Inquiries
templates.content: We don't handle post-purchase requests via text. Please email your request to  care@cariuma.com, or Whatsapp us at +18883088698. Please let me know if you have any questions about our products, I'm more than happy to help you here.

templates.name: The free socks / free laces code doesn't work!
templates.content: Sorry to hear about that. You'll actually need to add the free item to the cart along with a pair of sneakers, then proceed to checkout with the promo code. We don't automatically add the free item to the cart if you just add the promo code. Please feel free to try again and let me know how that goes!

templates.name: Code issues
templates.content: If the system isn't allowing you to use the code, then it means that your email is not on the list. Is there a different email you might have used? If so, please try checking out with that one instead.

templates.name: What animal is the suede and leather from?
templates.content: Our suede and leather are from cows. They are ethically sourced and you can find out more about them via this page: https://www.cariuma.com/blogs/articles/what-is-ethically-sourced-leather

templates.name: Do your shoes have arch support?
templates.content: Our signature insole is designed with the necessary softness and resilience, with slight arch support to make our sneakers a really comfortable shoe.

templates.name: Are your shoes slip resistant?
templates.content: All our sneakers are constructed with a 100% slip-resistant rubber that is vulcanized and has a stitched midsole maximizing quality and durability.

templates.name: How do I clean my shoes?
templates.content: You can clean your shoes regularly with a soft brush to get extra dirt and dust off them. If you're cleaning our washable shoes (IBI or IBI Slip-On), be sure to treat them the same as hand-wash garments. Remove the insoles, set them in a cool cycle (less than 30 degrees celsius) and air-dry them away from direct sunlight.

templates.name: I can't seem to get the free socks
templates.content: The socks should be added to your cart along with a pair of shoes for the code (SOCKON) to properly apply.

templates.name: Are your sneakers waterproof?
templates.content: Our sneakers are resistant to water, but not fully waterproof since we avoided the addition of any chemical waterproof paint. All of our sneakers are made from natural materials with no chemicals added to them. At this time, only our IBI High top style is water-repellent.

templates.name: Are your shoes machine washable?
templates.content: Only our IBIs are machine washable. For canvas, we recommend spot-treating stains as they arise. You can hand-wash your sneakers and use a toothbrush to reach in between grooves, or an old kitchen towel,  with neutral soap and warm water.

templates.name: Payment Methods
templates.content: We accept all major credit and debit cards, ShopPay, PayPal, and AfterPay.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you.

templates.name: How do I start a return/exchange?
templates.content: You can start your return/exchange here: https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/v35-BleR

templates.name: Difference between OCA AND OCA Pantone
templates.content: Basically, OCA and OCA Pantone are the same shoe, but the difference is OCA Pantone is a collab with the colour company - PANTONE. That means we selected the shade from their colour catalogue to include their logo on the shoes.

templates.name: Add code/free gift retroactively
templates.content:
If it's within 30min of placing your order, I'd highly recommend emailing us at care@cariuma.com, or Whatsapp Us at +18883088698.
 
If it's been more than 1 hour, your order is already being processed so we're unable to make changes to it at this time. Not to worry - including your accessory in the next purchase you make with us helps us consume consciously and keep our commitment towards making crazy comfy sneakers without harming people or the planet.

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://cariuma.com/pages/returns

templates.name: Do you have wide widths/sizes?
templates.content: We don't offer wide sizing right now, for US Women 5-9 and US Men 7.5 and smaller, the shoe width is a standard B width, and for US Women 9.5 - 13 and US Men 8 - 13, the shoe width is a standard D width, however, a few customers with wider feet find our sneakers work well for them. If you have width concerns, our IBI is made with bamboo knit material, and is made to mold to fit your feet due to its flexibility and stretchable characteristics. We do also offer free returns, so give them a try.

templates.name: Insole details
templates.content: Our stack height is around 17-20mm, the height difference from the heel to toe is 4mm, and the difference is at the insole, which has 10mm height on the back and 6mm on the front part.

templates.name: Where are your sneakers manufactured?
templates.content: Our sneakers are manufactured in China following the highest standards of quality, working conditions, and environmental practices. We're developing a new factory in Brazil, where we'll be producing some of our sneakers in a few short months. We have carefully chosen the factories we work with to ensure ethical working conditions, and that employees are provided with suitable wages and a supportive, favorable facility. The factories comply with an accredited and supportive code of conduct that covers these working and living conditions, wages and overall culture. You check check our about page for more info: https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/7K60dJ0M

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $125. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at wholesale@cariuma.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/cariuma/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/Cariuma/

templates.name: How do I get the shoes to glow?
templates.content:
We suggest leaving the sneakers near or under a light source/sun for the glow-in-the-dark features to work. Here are the recommended directions for use:

- Expose the shoes under light when it needs to be charged, it can be room light or natural sunlight
- If the shoes are stored in dark environment for a long time, glowing effect would weaken
- Keep the shoes away from over-heated temperature as it might damage the glowing effect
- Don't brush the glowing elements heavily as it might cause the glow effect to peel off or weaken

Due to the conservation of energy, the glowing effect performs the best in the first 6 months. The illumination density gets relatively weaker over time compared to the first 6 months.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at care@cariuma.com, or Whatsapp Us at +18883088698. Our team is happy to help.

templates.name: No promotions available
templates.content: I'm sorry, I don't have any codes available at the moment, but as an SMS subscriber you'll be the first to know of our upcoming promotions. In the meantime, you can check out our sales collection here:

templates.name: What is the sole height?
templates.content: The sole is about 1 and a half inches tall.

templates.name: Where are your headquarters?
templates.content: Our team is spread throughout Los Angeles, Singapore, Hong Kong, New York, China, and Brazil.

templates.name: Size chart
templates.content: Our sneakers run true to size. If your shoe size varies (sometimes you're an 8, sometimes you're an 8.5), we recommend sizing up. I'd still recommend checking our size guide to find the best fit: https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/aEOBAA5d

templates.name: How do I take care of my shoes?
templates.content: All our shoes are design pieces made from natural materials of the highest quality. It requires a little love and care to keep them in the best condition. You should avoid prolonged and direct exposure to sources of light and heat and always store the sneakers in their original packaging. Any contact with water, oil, perfume or cosmetics should also be avoided.

templates.name: Insole replacement
templates.content: Right now our insoles aren't sold separately and they're only available for purchase in their coordinating sneaker size (must be the same size you select at checkout). Sorry for the inconvenience.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: Our international warehouse is in Singapore, as we're able to efficiently ship our sneakers to 50 different countries.

templates.name: Socks
templates.content: Our socks are solid colors with a few different color options and are available in crew and no-show options. Here are some examples:  https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/Qy71O2sL and https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/IjjGn3IS Our Crew socks are also available in rose, off-white, black and navy.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here: https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/Ng8bZblT

templates.name: What's the difference between knit and suede?
templates.content: The difference between knit and suede is that the knit material is full vegan and we use bamboo in a 3D knitting process for the IBI sneakers collection, whereas the suede isn't vegan friendly as we use animal leather.

templates.name: How long do your sneakers last?
templates.content: How long they last depends on how often you wear them and how you wear them. Our sneakers are crafted with natural premium materials, an obsessive eye for detail, and a conscious mind. All of the outsoles on our sneakers are stitched for longer wear (so they don't break away from the sneaker as many others do).  With normal wear, they're built to last a very long time. Due to our quality, finishing, and ethical practices, you're receiving far more than what you are paying for. Check out more about it here - https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/gEAdRtlg

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 - 2 business days and we ship via multiple shipping partners. Once shipped, it will take 6 - 7 business days for international standard shipping. We also offer expedited shipping which takes 3 - 4 business days and an express shipping option which takes 2 business days.

templates.name: Do you ship to my country?
templates.content: We ship to 49 regions worldwide! You can see the full list here: www.cariuma.com/pages/shipping

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at care@cariuma.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Can I purchase a pair with different sizes?
templates.content: Yes, please check out our single shoe section here and add the sizes you need to your cart: https://cariuma.attn.tv/sl/PEKJCxca

templates.name: What's the difference between OCA low and IBI?
templates.content: IBI has knit material that is fully vegan and we use bamboo in a 3D knitting process, whereas the OCA Low features lightweight cushion technology, a perfectly-weighted rubber sole, and a classic cap-toe design for a crazy-comfy, go-to look.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: We don't handle post-purchase requests via text. Please email your request to care@cariuma.com, or Whatsapp us at +18883088698. Please let me know if you have any questions about our products, I'm more than happy to help you here.

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: How long does a refund take to process?
templates.content: If you choose to drop off your shoes at a Happy Returns Return Bar, then your refund will be initiated immediately. If you send them via mail, then it takes up to 3 weeks for our warehouse to process your return. We'll notify you once your return has been approved.

templates.name: When can I receive my whole order if it includes pre-order items?
templates.content: Your pre-order item will be delivered to you upon availability. If your order contains a pre-order item and a non pre-order item, the available items will be shipped separately in a new order, and your pre-order item will be delivered once ready.

templates.name: Do you have a better deal?
templates.content: This is the best SMS promo we have at the moment! I hope this helps your decision to go for it and definitely keep an eye out for upcoming promotions!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for our offer here: https://www.cariuma.com/pages/our-discount-program?currency=USD

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.cariuma.com/collections/last-chance-men

templates.name: How are cleaning products shipped?
templates.content: Cleaning products will be fulfilled and shipped separately by our partner Jason Markk. They can only be shipped to the USA and they will be shipped using standard shipping.

templates.name: Why is my order split into multiple deliveries?
templates.content: Orders can sometimes be split over a number of deliveries due to products in one order being stored across multiple warehouses. Also, products listed as pre-order will be shipped at a later date so that you will receive the available product first. And if you have ordered four or more pairs of sneakers, apparel, or backpacks; your order will be split and shipped separately.

templates.name: Do you offer custom sneakers?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we no longer offer custom sneakers. We apologize for any inconvenience.

templates.name: When will my pre order ship?
templates.content: Your pre-order item will be delivered upon availability. If your order contains a pre-order item and a non pre-order item, the available item will be shipped separately in a new order, and your pre-order item will be delivered once ready. For more details about arrival dates, please visit the following link: https://cariuma.gorgias.help/en-US/when-will-i-receive-my-pre-order-243800

templates.name: Order tracking
templates.content: Once your order ships, you can track it here: https://www.cariuma.com/pages/tracking

templates.name: Code won't work (ordering via shop app)
templates.content: I'm sorry to hear that. Please try placing the order directly from our website instead of the shop app. This might be why the code doesn't work. Let me know how it goes!
